channel.title: CodeAct on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in CodeAct on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: Announcing: CodeAct pattern and Hyperlight containers in Microsoft Agent Framework
item.description:
Microsoft Agent Framework now includes the CodeAct pattern in public preview. It lets agents execute multi-step plans as a single code block instead of sequential tool calls, which reduced end-to-end latency in representative workloads.

  • Source: Azure Updates
